items.summary: Notre Dame is really stacking the talent along the defensive line with its 2027 football recruiting class. items.title: Halloween in Philly: The Night Notre Dame Survived
items.summary: There are games you remember because everything went right. Notre Dame’s Halloween night trip to Philadelphia in 2015 was not one of them.
